div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: SQL: 统计信息过时 / 数据倾斜

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
大表广播到每个 TiFlash 节点
或 NLJ 对内表反复扫描

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
高频值集中到单个 PX worker
单 DFO 线程成为长尾

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
额外 Region/Tablet 扫描
exchange 积压 / 内存压力

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
gRPC 回传快于消费 → cop OOM
查询延迟从毫秒涨到分钟

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
worker 内存超租户 SQL memory 配额
→ 落盘或报错

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 观测： EXPLAIN ANALYZE / SQL 执行诊断 / 日志

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
TiDB 兜底： ANALYZE 重建统计 /
关闭过时伪统计 / 强制 hint(BROADCAST_JOIN 等)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
OB 兜底： 运行期自适应(滑动窗口停用失效 join filter /
自适应 HASH GROUP BY / 自适应混合 hash shuffle 抗倾斜)+ hint
